summary: Serving latency spike after router deploy
description: p99 latency doubled within minutes of a routine router deploy. No error rate increase, just latency. Rolled back within the hour.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: New build of src/serving/router.ts changed the random replica pick to iterate the full replica list per request instead of indexing directly. Fine at low replica counts, expensive at our current fleet size.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Rolled back per the deploy runbook, latency back to baseline within five minutes of the flip.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: Fixed the pick function to index directly instead of iterating, re-deployed with a load test this time. Latency flat. Resolving.
